org.apache.paimon.fs

Interface FileIOLoader

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    FlinkFileIOLoader, HadoopFileIOLoader, HadoopViewFsFileIOLoader, LocalFileIOLoader, OSSLoader, S3Loader

    @Public
public interface FileIOLoader
    Loader to load FileIO.
    Since:
    0.4.0

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      String getScheme() 
      FileIO load(Path path) 
      default List<String[]> requiredOptions()
      Returns a set of option keys (case-insensitive, key can be written in multiple ways) that an implementation of this FileIO requires.

    • Method Detail

      • getScheme

        String getScheme()

      • requiredOptions

        default List<String[]> requiredOptions()
        Returns a set of option keys (case-insensitive, key can be written in multiple ways) that an implementation of this FileIO requires. Only when these options are included will this FileIO be selected, otherwise it will fall back to HadoopFileIO or compute engine's own FileIO.

      • load

        FileIO load(Path path)
